# Research And Policy Analyst (Tigrinya Speaking)

#### [Sastre Consulting](https://uk.linkedin.com/company/sastreconsulting?trk=public_jobs_topcard-org-name) Eritrea                                                                        5 months ago     Be among the first 25 applicants    [![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/9c8pery4andzj6ohjkjp54ma2)![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/9c8pery4andzj6ohjkjp54ma2)![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/9c8pery4andzj6ohjkjp54ma2)\ \  See who Sastre Consulting has hired for this role](https://www.linkedin.com/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedin%2Ecom%2Fsearch%2Fresults%2Fpeople%2F%3FfacetCurrentCompany%3D29036727%26title%3DResearch%2BAnd%2BPolicy%2BAnalyst&emailAddress=&fromSignIn=&trk=public_jobs_see-who-was-hired_people-search-link_face-pile-cta)No longer accepting applications

### Samridhi Malhotra

#### Researcher \| Human-Computer Interaction

[Message Samridhi Malhotra](https://www.linkedin.com/login?emailAddress=&fromSignIn=&session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fat.linkedin.com%2Fin%2Fsamridhi-malhotra-&trk=public_jobs_message-the-recruiter-cta)

Sastre Consulting Ltd. is a London-based research consultancy which provides services in the areas of business intelligence, corporate investigations, policy analysis, and regulatory and political risk.

We are hiring policy researchers for health policy projects starting in January 2025 and we are looking for **Tigrinya** **speaking analysts.**

Our policy projects typically involve scoring a number of indicators, then justifying the score based on official documents, laws, regulations, government strategies, as well as academic and news-media sources and, where these are not sufficient, expert interviews.

Our ideal candidate would have:

- strong research skills
- at least an advanced level of English
- able to work in a flexible environment

The fees vary between 1000 and 1,600 USD based on the deadline and the scope of research. **The position is remote.**

Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience
- Previous qualitative and quantitative research experience
- Excellent written English skills
